name: Greek Isle Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the peeled and seeded cucumber.
2. Drain the feta cheese well.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
4. Form into a loaf shape.
5. Place on a baking sheet and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
